seoTitle: South Turramurra vs South Wentworthville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Turramurra and South Wentworthville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Turramurra vs South Wentworthville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Turramurra and South Wentworthville.
heading: South Turramurra vs South Wentworthville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Turramurra, New South Wales and South Wentworthville, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Wentworthville has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to South Turramurra (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Turramurra or South Wentworthville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Turramurra has a flood risk score of 59/100, while South Wentworthville scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Turramurra scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. South Wentworthville scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Turramurra or South Wentworthville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Wentworthville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
